title: Yellow Jacket Removal in Somers, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional yellow jacket removal in Somers, Westchester. Safe nest elimination from homes & properties. Licensed exterminators. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Yellow jackets pose a serious threat to Somers residents, especially during late summer when colonies peak in aggression. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective yellow jacket removal services throughout Somers, protecting your family and pets from painful stings. Our trained specialists safely eliminate nests from residential properties, yards, and structures with proven techniques.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Westchester County, including Somers, with specialized yellow jacket removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, EPA-approved methods and offer same-day service to quickly address dangerous nest situations before anyone gets hurt.
localContext: Somers properties, from historic homes near the Elephant Hotel to modern residences around Muscoot Reservoir, frequently encounter yellow jacket nests in eaves, ground burrows, and wooded areas. The town's mix of suburban yards and natural spaces creates ideal nesting conditions, making professional removal essential for safe outdoor enjoyment.

faqs.question: How much does yellow jacket removal cost in Somers?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket removal in Somers typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests are usually less expensive than those in walls or high eaves. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency yellow jacket removal service in Somers. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours. We understand the urgency when aggressive yellow jackets threaten your property and prioritize rapid response to keep your family safe.

faqs.question: What's the best time to remove yellow jacket nests?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket nests are best removed early morning or evening when activity is lower and most workers have returned to the nest. However, our technicians are equipped to safely handle removals at any time of day, especially in emergency situations where someone is at immediate risk.

faqs.question: Will yellow jackets return after nest removal?
faqs.answer: Once we completely remove the nest and treat the area, yellow jackets will not rebuild in that exact location. However, new colonies may attempt to establish themselves elsewhere on your property the following season. We offer preventative treatments and inspections to minimize future infestations.
